summary: Migrated 4 bindings (ctrl-?, ctrl-shift-e, ctrl-shift-c, ctrl-enter) to secondary- in keymap.json; updated keybindings.md and cheat sheet to platform-neutral notation.

completion_data.completion_summary: Migrated 4 safe keybindings from ctrl- to secondary- for platform-adaptive behavior. Updated keymap.json header, keybindings.md (platform-neutral notation), and cheat sheet (dagger legend for adaptive bindings).
